name: khive
description: Knowledge graph runtime, structured memory, and agent coordination tools.

plugins.name: kg
plugins.description: Persistent knowledge graph — typed entities, closed edge ontology, hybrid search, GQL/SPARQL queries

plugins.name: gtd
plugins.description: GTD-style task lifecycle (assign/next/complete/transition) over the notes substrate

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Persistent agent memory with decay-weighted recall (remember/recall verbs)

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Structured knowledge atoms and domains — suggest, compose, search, fold, section-level hybrid scoring

plugins.name: brain
plugins.description: Bayesian adaptive profiles — posteriors over section types, feedback signals, profile lifecycle

plugins.name: comm
plugins.description: Inter-agent messaging — send, inbox, reply, threaded conversations with read tracking

plugins.name: schedule
plugins.description: Time-based scheduling — reminders, future verb dispatch, recurring events
